description: User waits while the flight search results are being fetched, with the loading modal visible.
frame_description: A loading modal with the text 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!' is displayed over a scenic background.

description: The loading overlay disappears, revealing the flight search results page.
User hovers the cursor near the 'EDIT SEARCH' button immediately after the results load.
User pauses to review the listed flight options in the search results.
frame_description: The screen displays multiple flight options from Adelaide to Melbourne with prices and airline logos.

description: User moves the cursor to the filters sidebar on the left side of the page, specifically near the 'Airlines' section.
